UAE Timing

Guide to UAE Public Service Operating Hours

UAE Timing provides the latest and most comprehensive information on government office hours, parking times, Muroor services, car lift services, and bus schedules and routes in the UAE.

News & Updates

Bus Schedule

Navigating the UAE has never been easier with our comprehensive UAE Bus Schedule.

Find reliable information on departure times, routes, and stops for all major bus services across the UAE, making your journey smooth and hassle-free. Stay connected, travel efficiently, and explore the UAE with confidence using our up-to-date bus schedule resources.

UAE Traffic

Stay informed and compliant with the latest UAE traffic regulations and services. From understanding vehicle registration processes and traffic fines to navigating the roads safely, our comprehensive guides and resources are here to assist you.

Life in UAE

Navigating the financial landscape of the UAE can be a breeze with the right tools and knowledge. Our collection of guides will help you effortlessly manage your money, from checking balances to making payments.

Whether you’re a resident or a visitor, you’ll find valuable tips on how to use digital wallets, online banking platforms, and other financial services. With our easy-to-follow instructions and expert advice, you can take control of your financial well-being and enjoy a stress-free financial experience in the UAE.

Nol Card Balance Check

NBAD Bank Balance

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 1, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
